name: My experience
title: Path
description: From education and freelancing to commercial development, mentoring, and product work.

cards.title: JavaScript Education
cards.description: Completed a full training cycle in JavaScript development: language fundamentals, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, basic client-side application architecture, and practice on educational projects.

cards.title: Freelance Development
cards.company: Project work · freelance platforms and direct orders
cards.description: Handled turnkey client projects: landing pages, corporate websites, admin panels, and improvements to existing projects. Worked with technical specifications, deadlines, revisions, and production launches.

cards.title: Frontend Developer / Mentor
cards.description: Developed the company website, implemented and maintained key interfaces. Simultaneously assisted less experienced frontend developers with code reviews, task breakdowns, and establishing workflow approaches.

cards.title: Fullstack / Product Developer
cards.description: Developing an e-commerce platform and participating in startup project launches: feature design, integrations, production support, business process optimization, and development of new directions.
